with date_spine as (
    select dateadd(day, seq4(), '2022-01-01'::date) as date_day
    from table(generator(rowcount => 1461))
)

select
    date_day,
    year(date_day) as year,
    month(date_day) as month_number,
    day(date_day) as day_of_month,
    dayofweek(date_day) as day_of_week,
    to_char(date_day, 'YYYY-MM') as year_month,
    to_char(date_day, 'Mon') as month_name,
    case when dayofweek(date_day) in (0, 6) then true else false end as is_weekend,
    date_trunc('month', date_day) as first_day_of_month,
    date_trunc('quarter', date_day) as first_day_of_quarter
from date_spine

select

select date_day
from "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_date"
where date_day is null

select
    date_day as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_date"
where date_day is not null
group by date_day
having count(*) > 1

select
    m.membership_id,
    m.member_id,
    m.plan_id,
    p.plan_tier,
    p.studio_id,
    m.status,
    m.started_at,
    m.ended_at,
    m.auto_renew,
    m.monthly_price_usd,
    datediff('day', m.started_at, coalesce(m.ended_at, current_date)) as active_days,
    case when m.status = 'active' then 1 else 0 end as is_active
from "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__memberships" m
left join "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__membership_plans" p on m.plan_id = p.plan_id

select
    c.class_id,
    c.studio_id,
    st.studio_name,
    c.class_name,
    c.class_type,
    c.duration_minutes,
    c.capacity,
    c.is_active
from "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__classes" c
left join "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__studios" st on c.studio_id = st.studio_id

select
    i.instructor_id,
    i.studio_id,
    st.studio_name,
    st.region,
    i.first_name,
    i.last_name,
    i.email,
    i.specialty,
    i.hired_date,
    i.is_active
from "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__instructors" i
left join "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__studios" st on i.studio_id = st.studio_id

select
    m.member_id,
    m.studio_id,
    st.studio_name,
    st.region,
    m.first_name,
    m.last_name,
    m.email,
    m.status as member_status,
    m.joined_date,
    datediff('day', m.joined_date, current_date) as tenure_days
from "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__members" m
left join "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__studios" st on m.studio_id = st.studio_id

select

from "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__studios"

select
    p.plan_id,
    p.studio_id,
    st.studio_name,
    p.plan_name,
    p.plan_tier,

    p.monthly_price_usd,
    p.included_class_credits,

from "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__membership_plans" p
left join "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__studios" st on p.studio_id = st.studio_id

select
    b.booking_id,
    b.schedule_id,
    s.class_id,
    c.class_name,
    c.class_type,
    s.studio_id,
    st.studio_name,
    st.region,
    b.member_id,
    m.email as member_email,
    s.instructor_id,
    s.start_at as class_start_at,
    s.end_at as class_end_at,
    b.booking_status,
    b.booked_at,
    b.checked_in_at,
    b.is_no_show
from "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__bookings" b
left join "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__class_schedules" s on b.schedule_id = s.schedule_id
left join "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__classes" c on s.class_id = c.class_id
left join "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__members" m on b.member_id = m.member_id
left join "flowstate"."staging_app_db"."stg_app_db__studios" st on s.studio_id = st.studio_id

with google as (
    select
        'google_ads' as channel,
        gs.campaign_id,
        gc.campaign_name,
        gs.date_day,
        gs.impressions,
        gs.clicks,
        gs.cost_usd as spend_usd,
        gs.conversions as leads
    from "flowstate"."staging_marketing"."stg_google_ads__campaign_stats" gs
    left join "flowstate"."staging_marketing"."stg_google_ads__campaigns" gc
        on gs.campaign_id = gc.campaign_id
),

facebook as (
    select
        'facebook_ads' as channel,
        fi.campaign_id,
        fc.campaign_name,
        fi.date_day,
        fi.impressions,
        fi.clicks,
        fi.spend_usd,
        fi.leads
    from "flowstate"."staging_marketing"."stg_facebook_ads__ad_insights" fi
    left join "flowstate"."staging_marketing"."stg_facebook_ads__campaigns" fc
        on fi.campaign_id = fc.campaign_id
)

select
    channel,
    campaign_id,
    campaign_name,
    date_day,
    impressions,
    clicks,
    spend_usd,
    leads
from google

union all

select
    channel,
    campaign_id,
    campaign_name,
    date_day,
    impressions,
    clicks,
    spend_usd,
    leads
from facebook

with events as (
    select
        email_campaign_id,
        event_type,
        contact_id
    from "flowstate"."staging_marketing"."stg_hubspot__email_events"
),

campaigns as (
    select
        email_campaign_id,
        campaign_name,
        subject_line,
        email_type,
        send_date,
        num_recipients
    from "flowstate"."staging_marketing"."stg_hubspot__email_campaigns"
)

select
    c.email_campaign_id,
    c.campaign_name,
    c.subject_line,
    c.email_type,
    c.send_date,
    c.num_recipients,
    count(case when e.event_type = 'open' then 1 end) as total_opens,
    count(case when e.event_type = 'click' then 1 end) as total_clicks,
    count(case when e.event_type = 'bounce' then 1 end) as total_bounces,
    count(case when e.event_type = 'unsubscribe' then 1 end) as total_unsubscribes,
    count(distinct case when e.event_type = 'open' then e.contact_id end) as unique_openers,
    count(distinct case when e.event_type = 'click' then e.contact_id end) as unique_clickers
from campaigns c
left join events e
    on c.email_campaign_id = e.email_campaign_id
group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6

where account_id is null

select
    date_trunc('month', gl.posted_at) as accounting_month,
    gl.account_id,
    acc.account_name,
    acc.account_type,
    acc.statement_category,
    sum(case when gl.debit_credit = 'debit' then gl.amount_usd else 0 end) as total_debits_usd,
    sum(case when gl.debit_credit = 'credit' then gl.amount_usd else 0 end) as total_credits_usd,
    sum(
        case
            when gl.debit_credit = 'credit' then gl.amount_usd
            else -gl.amount_usd
        end
    ) as net_amount_usd,
    count(gl.entry_id) as entry_count
from "flowstate"."staging_ops"."stg_quickbooks__general_ledger" gl
left join "flowstate"."staging_ops"."stg_quickbooks__accounts" acc on gl.account_id = acc.account_id
where acc.statement_category = 'profit_and_loss'
group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5

select

    d.cost_center,
    d.org_group,
    count(e.employee_id) as total_employees,
    count(case when e.terminated_at is null then e.employee_id end) as active_employees,
    count(case when e.terminated_at is not null then e.employee_id end) as terminated_employees,
    min(e.hired_at) as earliest_hire_at,
    max(e.hired_at) as latest_hire_at
from "flowstate"."staging_ops"."stg_rippling__employees" e
left join "flowstate"."staging_ops"."stg_rippling__departments" d on e.department = d.department_name
group by 1, 2, 3

select
    l.lead_id,
    l.first_name,
    l.last_name,
    l.email,
    l.company_name,
    l.lead_source,
    l.lead_status,
    l.industry,
    l.estimated_studio_count,
    l.owner_id,
    u.full_name as owner_name,
    u.sales_team,
    l.is_converted,
    l.converted_account_id,
    l.converted_opportunity_id,
    o.stage_name as converted_stage_name,
    o.amount_arr_usd as converted_amount_arr_usd,
    o.is_won as converted_is_won,
    l.created_at,
    l.converted_at
from "flowstate"."staging_salesforce"."stg_salesforce__leads" l
left join "flowstate"."staging_salesforce"."stg_salesforce__users" u on l.owner_id = u.user_id
left join "flowstate"."staging_salesforce"."stg_salesforce__opportunities" o on l.converted_opportunity_id = o.opportunity_id

select
    o.opportunity_id,
    o.opportunity_name,
    o.account_id,
    a.account_name,
    a.industry,
    a.studio_count,
    a.billing_state_code as account_state_code,
    o.owner_id,
    u.full_name as owner_name,
    u.sales_team,
    u.region as owner_region,
    o.stage_name,
    o.amount_arr_usd,
    o.probability,
    o.amount_arr_usd * o.probability as weighted_arr_usd,
    o.lead_source,
    o.forecast_category,
    o.is_won,
    o.is_closed,
    o.created_at,
    o.close_date
from "flowstate"."staging_salesforce"."stg_salesforce__opportunities" o
left join "flowstate"."staging_salesforce"."stg_salesforce__accounts" a on o.account_id = a.account_id
left join "flowstate"."staging_salesforce"."stg_salesforce__users" u on o.owner_id = u.user_id

select
    h.opportunity_history_id,
    h.opportunity_id,
    o.opportunity_name,
    o.account_id,
    h.from_stage_name,
    h.to_stage_name,
    h.amount_arr_usd,
    h.probability,
    h.changed_by_user_id,
    u.full_name as changed_by_name,
    h.is_stage_change,
    o.is_won,
    o.is_closed,
    h.created_at as transition_at
from "flowstate"."staging_salesforce"."stg_salesforce__opportunity_history" h
left join "flowstate"."staging_salesforce"."stg_salesforce__opportunities" o on h.opportunity_id = o.opportunity_id
left join "flowstate"."staging_salesforce"."stg_salesforce__users" u on h.changed_by_user_id = u.user_id

select

    t.requester_member_id,
    t.assignee_id,
    a.name as assignee_name,
    a.role as assignee_role,
    t.status,
    t.priority,
    t.channel,
    t.ticket_type,
    t.created_at,
    t.solved_at,
    datediff('hour', t.created_at, t.solved_at) as resolution_hours,
    t.satisfaction_score,
    r.score as csat_rating,
    r.comment as csat_comment
from "flowstate"."staging_ops"."stg_zendesk__tickets" t
left join "flowstate"."staging_ops"."stg_zendesk__users" a on t.assignee_id = a.user_id

select
    t.transaction_id,
    t.invoice_id,
    t.subscription_id,
    t.member_id,
    m.member_name,
    m.studio_id,
    t.transaction_type,
    t.status as transaction_status,
    t.amount_usd as transaction_amount_usd,
    t.payment_method,
    t.gateway,
    t.processed_at,
    cn.credit_note_id,
    coalesce(cn.amount_refunded_usd, 0) as amount_refunded_usd,
    cn.reason_code as credit_reason_code
from "flowstate"."staging_billing"."stg_chargebee__transactions" t
left join "flowstate"."staging_billing"."stg_chargebee__credit_notes" cn on t.invoice_id = cn.invoice_id
left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_member" m on t.member_id = m.member_id

select
    i.invoice_id,
    i.subscription_id,
    i.member_id,
    m.member_name,
    i.status as invoice_status,
    i.total_usd,
    i.amount_paid_usd,
    i.amount_due_usd,
    i.currency,
    i.issued_at,
    d.date_day as issued_date,
    d.fiscal_month,
    i.due_at,
    i.paid_at
from "flowstate"."staging_billing"."stg_chargebee__invoices" i
left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_member" m on i.member_id = m.member_id
left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_date" d on cast(i.issued_at as date) = d.date_day

with sessions as (
    select
        member_id,
        cast(session_started_at as date) as activity_date,
        session_id,
        duration_seconds,
        event_count,
        platform
    from "flowstate"."staging_product"."stg_segment__sessions"
    where member_id is not null
)

select
    s.activity_date,
    s.member_id,
    dm.region as member_region,
    dm.member_status,
    count(distinct s.session_id) as session_count,
    sum(s.event_count) as total_events,
    sum(s.duration_seconds) as total_duration_seconds,
    max(s.platform) as last_platform
from sessions s
left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_member" dm on s.member_id = dm.member_id
group by 1, 2, 3, 4

with tracks as (
    select
        event_id,
        member_id,
        event_name,
        'track' as event_category,
        occurred_at,
        device_type,
        platform
    from "flowstate"."staging_product"."stg_segment__tracks"
),

pages as (
    select
        event_id,
        member_id,
        page_name as event_name,
        'page' as event_category,
        occurred_at,
        device_type,
        platform
    from "flowstate"."staging_product"."stg_segment__pages"
),

screens as (
    select
        event_id,
        member_id,
        screen_name as event_name,
        'screen' as event_category,
        occurred_at,
        device_type,
        platform
    from "flowstate"."staging_product"."stg_segment__screens"
),

unioned as (
    select event_id, member_id, event_name, event_category, occurred_at, device_type, platform from tracks
    union all
    select event_id, member_id, event_name, event_category, occurred_at, device_type, platform from pages
    union all
    select event_id, member_id, event_name, event_category, occurred_at, device_type, platform from screens
)

select
    u.event_id,
    u.member_id,
    dm.region as member_region,
    dm.member_status,
    u.event_name,
    u.event_category,
    u.occurred_at,
    cast(u.occurred_at as date) as event_date,
    u.device_type,
    u.platform
from unioned u
left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_member" dm on u.member_id = dm.member_id

select member_id
from "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_member"
where member_id is null

with feature_events as (
    select
        member_id,
        case
            when event_name in ('booked_class', 'viewed_schedule', 'cancelled_booking') then 'scheduling'
            when event_name in ('checked_in', 'scanned_qr') then 'check_in'
            when event_name in ('purchased_membership', 'upgraded_plan', 'viewed_pricing') then 'membership'
            when event_name in ('viewed_progress', 'logged_workout', 'set_goal') then 'fitness_tracking'
            else 'other'
        end as feature_area,
        event_name,
        occurred_at
    from "flowstate"."staging_product"."stg_segment__tracks"
    where member_id is not null
)

select
    fe.feature_area,
    fe.member_id,
    dm.region as member_region,
    dm.member_status,
    count(*) as event_count,
    count(distinct fe.event_name) as distinct_actions,
    min(fe.occurred_at) as first_used_at,
    max(fe.occurred_at) as last_used_at
from feature_events fe
left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_member" dm on fe.member_id = dm.member_id
group by 1, 2, 3, 4

parent as (

)

from child

    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

from "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_member"
where member_id is not null

    p.plan_name,
    p.plan_tier,
    p.price_usd as plan_price_usd,
    s.status as subscription_status,

    s.started_at,
    s.activated_at,

from "flowstate"."staging_billing"."stg_chargebee__subscriptions" s

left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_member" m on s.member_id = m.member_id
left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_studio" st on m.studio_id = st.studio_id

select
    booking_id,
    schedule_id,
    class_id,
    studio_id,
    member_id,
    instructor_id,
    class_start_at,
    booking_status,
    booked_at,
    checked_in_at,
    is_no_show,
    case when checked_in_at is not null then 1 else 0 end as is_attended
from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_bookings"

select
    booking_id,
    schedule_id,
    class_id,
    studio_id,
    member_id,
    instructor_id,
    class_start_at,
    checked_in_at,
    date_trunc('day', checked_in_at) as checkin_date,
    datediff('minute', booked_at, checked_in_at) as minutes_from_booking_to_checkin
from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_bookings"
where checked_in_at is not null

with ad_performance as (
    select
        channel,
        campaign_id,
        campaign_name,
        date_day,
        impressions,
        clicks,
        spend_usd,
        leads
    from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_marketing_ad_performance"
)

select
    ap.date_day,
    d.day_of_week,
    d.month_name,
    ap.channel,
    ap.campaign_id,
    ap.campaign_name,
    sum(ap.impressions) as impressions,
    sum(ap.clicks) as clicks,
    sum(ap.spend_usd) as spend_usd,
    sum(ap.leads) as leads
from ad_performance ap
left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_date" d
    on ap.date_day = d.date_day
group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6

select
    o.stage_name,
    o.forecast_category,
    count(*) as opportunity_count,
    count(distinct o.account_id) as account_count,
    sum(o.amount_arr_usd) as total_arr_usd,
    avg(o.amount_arr_usd) as avg_arr_usd,
    avg(o.probability) as avg_probability,
    sum(o.weighted_arr_usd) as weighted_arr_usd,
    sum(case when o.is_won = true then 1 else 0 end) as won_count,
    sum(case when o.is_closed = true and o.is_won = false then 1 else 0 end) as lost_count
from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_sales_opportunities_enriched" o
group by 1, 2

select
    o.owner_name,
    o.sales_team,
    o.owner_region,
    o.stage_name,
    count(*) as opportunity_count,
    sum(case when o.is_closed = false then 1 else 0 end) as open_count,
    sum(case when o.is_won = true then 1 else 0 end) as won_count,
    sum(case when o.is_closed = true and o.is_won = false then 1 else 0 end) as lost_count,
    sum(o.amount_arr_usd) as total_arr_usd,
    sum(case when o.is_closed = false then o.amount_arr_usd else 0 end) as open_arr_usd,
    sum(case when o.is_won = true then o.amount_arr_usd else 0 end) as won_arr_usd,
    sum(case when o.is_closed = false then o.weighted_arr_usd else 0 end) as weighted_open_arr_usd
from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_sales_opportunities_enriched" o
group by 1, 2, 3, 4

select
    charge_id,
    member_id,
    studio_id,
    amount_usd,
    currency,
    charge_status,
    charged_at,
    refunded,
    case
        when charge_status = 'succeeded' and not refunded then amount_usd
        else 0
    end as net_revenue_usd
from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_payments"

with daily as (
    select
        activity_date,
        member_id,
        member_region,
        session_count,
        total_events,
        total_duration_seconds
    from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_product_daily_active_members"
)

select
    d.activity_date,
    d.member_region,
    count(distinct d.member_id) as daily_active_members,
    count(distinct case
        when d.member_id is not null then d.member_id end) as active_members,
    sum(d.session_count) as total_sessions,
    sum(d.total_events) as total_events,
    round(avg(d.total_duration_seconds), 1) as avg_session_seconds_per_member,
    round(sum(d.total_events) / nullif(count(distinct d.member_id), 0), 2) as events_per_active_member
from daily d
group by 1, 2

with adoption as (
    select
        feature_area,
        member_id,
        member_region,
        event_count,
        distinct_actions,
        first_used_at,
        last_used_at
    from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_product_feature_adoption"
),

member_base as (
    select count(distinct member_id) as total_members
    from "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_member"
)

select
    a.feature_area,
    a.member_region,
    count(distinct a.member_id) as adopting_members,
    max(mb.total_members) as total_members,
    round(count(distinct a.member_id) / nullif(max(mb.total_members), 0), 4) as adoption_rate,
    sum(a.event_count) as total_feature_events,
    round(avg(a.distinct_actions), 2) as avg_distinct_actions_per_member,
    max(a.last_used_at) as most_recent_use_at
from adoption a
cross join member_base mb
group by 1, 2

select
    subscription_id,
    member_id,
    studio_id,
    plan_tier,
    started_at,
    cancelled_at,
    mrr_usd,
    case
        when cancelled_at is not null then 'churn'
        when subscription_status = 'active' and activated_at is not null then 'new'
        when subscription_status = 'active' then 'reactivation'
        else 'other'
    end as change_event_type,
    case
        when cancelled_at is not null then -1 * mrr_usd
        else mrr_usd
    end as mrr_delta_usd
from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_billing_subscriptions"

select
    studio_id,
    studio_name,
    region,
    plan_tier,
    count(distinct subscription_id) as active_subscriptions,
    count(distinct member_id) as active_members,
    sum(mrr_usd) as total_mrr_usd,
    avg(mrr_usd) as avg_mrr_per_subscription_usd,
    sum(mrr_usd) * 12 as annual_run_rate_usd
from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_billing_subscriptions"
where subscription_status = 'active'
group by
    studio_id,
    studio_name,
    region,
    plan_tier

select
    s.studio_id,
    s.studio_name,
    s.region,
    cl.class_type,
    count(*) as total_bookings,
    sum(fb.is_attended) as attended,
    sum(case when fb.is_no_show then 1 else 0 end) as no_shows,
    sum(fb.is_attended) / nullif(count(*), 0) as attendance_rate
from "flowstate"."master_data"."fact_booking" fb
left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_studio" s on fb.studio_id = s.studio_id
left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_class" cl on fb.class_id = cl.class_id
group by 1, 2, 3, 4

select booking_id
from "flowstate"."master_data"."fact_booking"
where booking_id is null

with child as (
    select class_id as from_field
    from "flowstate"."master_data"."fact_booking"
    where class_id is not null
),

parent as (
    select class_id as to_field
    from "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_class"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

with child as (
    select instructor_id as from_field
    from "flowstate"."master_data"."fact_booking"
    where instructor_id is not null

    from_field

from child

    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

    from "flowstate"."master_data"."fact_booking"
    where member_id is not null
),

parent as (
    select member_id as to_field
    from "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_member"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

with child as (
    select studio_id as from_field
    from "flowstate"."master_data"."fact_booking"
    where studio_id is not null
),

parent as (
    select studio_id as to_field
    from "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_studio"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

select
    booking_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "flowstate"."master_data"."fact_booking"
where booking_id is not null
group by booking_id
having count(*) > 1

with channel_totals as (
    select
        channel,
        sum(impressions) as impressions,
        sum(clicks) as clicks,
        sum(spend_usd) as spend_usd,
        sum(leads) as leads
    from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_marketing_daily_spend"
    group by 1
)

select
    channel,
    impressions,
    clicks,
    spend_usd,
    leads,
    round(spend_usd / nullif(leads, 0), 2) as customer_acquisition_cost_usd,
    round(clicks / nullif(impressions, 0), 4) as click_through_rate,
    round(leads / nullif(clicks, 0), 4) as lead_conversion_rate
from channel_totals

with spend as (
    select
        channel,
        campaign_id,
        campaign_name,
        sum(impressions) as impressions,
        sum(clicks) as clicks,
        sum(spend_usd) as spend_usd,
        sum(leads) as leads
    from "flowstate"."intermediate"."int_marketing_daily_spend"
    group by 1, 2, 3
)

select
    channel,
    campaign_id,
    campaign_name,
    impressions,
    clicks,
    spend_usd,
    leads,
    round(spend_usd / nullif(clicks, 0), 2) as cost_per_click_usd,
    round(spend_usd / nullif(leads, 0), 2) as cost_per_lead_usd,
    round(clicks / nullif(impressions, 0), 4) as click_through_rate
from spend

select
    s.studio_id,
    s.studio_name,
    s.region,
    date_trunc('day', fp.charged_at) as revenue_date,
    sum(fp.net_revenue_usd) as net_revenue_usd,
    count(distinct fp.member_id) as paying_members
from "flowstate"."master_data"."fact_payment" fp
left join "flowstate"."master_data"."dim_studio" s on fp.studio_id = s.studio_id
group by 1, 2, 3, 4

from "flowstate"."master_data"."fact_payment"
